title: Policy acknowledgment
description: An affirmative, per-user attestation that a published policy version has been read and accepted. Emitted to the evidence ledger by POST /v1/policies/{id}/acknowledge (slice 023). Annual recurrence is enforced at the handler (365-day freshness window); each policy publish creates a new policies row id so an ack of the prior version cannot satisfy the new version.

policy_id.description: Policy logical id. For v1 this equals policy_version_id (each version is its own row); kept separate for slice-035 logical-id graduation.

policy_version_id.description: The specific policies row id being acknowledged. FK target of policy_acknowledgments.policy_version_id.

user_id.description: The user that performed the acknowledgment. Set by the handler from cred.UserID; never accepted from the wire.

acknowledged_at.description: Wall-clock time the acknowledgment was recorded. RFC 3339 / ISO 8601.

policy_title.description: Optional. The policy title at acknowledgment time. Snapshotted for audit lineage (the policy row may rename after; the ack record preserves what the user attested to).

policy_version.description: Optional. The semver string at acknowledgment time.

required_roles.description: Optional. The acknowledgment_required_roles in force at acknowledgment time. Snapshotted for audit lineage.
